description: Tasks rewritten to match actual generated data

tasks.instruction: Find an upcoming charity ride within 50 miles of Dallas, sort the results by soonest date, and register for the earliest event using a mid-priced registration option and a Large T-shirt size.
tasks.name: Find an upcoming charity ride within 50 miles of Dallas, sort the results by soonest date, and register for the earliest event using a mid-priced registration option and a Large T-shirt size.

tasks.instruction: In the store’s T-shirts section, filter to shirts under $30 that offer size Large, sort by price from low to high, and add quantity 2 of the cheapest qualifying Large T-shirt to your cart.

tasks.instruction: Use the chapter locator to search within 100 miles of ZIP code 85001, open the nearest chapter in the results, and send a ride-along inquiry through its contact form.

tasks.instruction: On the membership page, compare all membership types, identify those with annual dues under $150, and start an application for the option with the lowest dues in that range, completing the first step with your basic details and agreement to the code of conduct.

tasks.instruction: In the news section, filter articles to those tagged Community Outreach from 2024, sort by newest first, open the newest article, and post the specified text comment with your name using the on-site comment form.

target_names: Thanksgiving Ride Delivers Meals to Seniors

expected_values.comment_text: Proud to see the club supporting our community.

tasks.instruction: Search for events near Chicago within 100 miles, sort them by soonest date, and add the first three upcoming events in the list to your ride plan.

tasks.instruction: On the donation page, choose a one-time donation in a mid-range amount (between $50 and $100), designate it to the fund that supports families of officers killed in the line of duty, and complete the donation using a credit card with the required billing details.

criteria.fund_description_contains: families of officers killed in the line of duty

tasks.instruction: From the safety and training section, filter courses to Group Riding sessions with a duration under 2 hours and enroll in the first course shown in the filtered list.

tasks.instruction: In the store’s patches category, filter to patches priced under $15 with at least 4 stars and 10 or more reviews, sort by top rated, and add quantity 1 of the first result to your cart.
